agents.name: pm-router
agents.description: Orchestration agent - routes requests to specialist agents

agents.description: Analyzes and ranks priorities across product areas or backlogs

agents.description: Creates executive-ready business cases with financial modeling

agents.name: prd-writer
agents.description: Creates and updates Product Requirements Documents

agents.name: agent-improver
agents.description: Self-improvement agent - proposes and applies changes to other agents
